videos.title: But what is a neural network? | Chapter 1, Deep learning
videos.description: A visually stunning and intuitive introduction to how neural networks work, breaking down the core structure and mathematics of deep learning in an accessible way.

videos.title: [Intro to Large Language Models]
videos.description: A highly accessible and comprehensive introduction to LLMs, explaining how they are trained, how they work, and their future direction by leading AI researcher Andrej Karpathy.

videos.title: What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?
videos.description: A clear, high-level conceptual overview from IBM Technology defining Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning, and how they differ.

videos.title: How Machines Learn
videos.description: A fun, engaging, and non-technical conceptual introduction to machine learning algorithms, neural networks, and evolutionary AI models.

videos.title: Python OpenAI API Crash Course - Build Your First AI App
videos.description: Learn how to set up the OpenAI API, handle authentication, and write your first Python scripts to interact with GPT models, establishing the core building blocks for AI development.

videos.title: Build a RAG App in 15 Minutes (LangChain, OpenAI, ChromaDB)
videos.description: A highly practical, step-by-step tutorial on building a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system to query your private PDF documents using LangChain and a vector database.

videos.title: How to Build an AI Chatbot Web App with Streamlit
videos.description: Discover how to quickly wrap your Python AI backend with a polished, interactive web-based chat interface using Streamlit, making your application user-friendly.

videos.title: Build Multi-Agent AI Systems with CrewAI
videos.description: Step up your AI engineering skills by learning how to design, program, and run autonomous multi-agent teams that collaborate on complex tasks using the CrewAI framework.

videos.title: What are AI Agents?
videos.description: A clear, foundational breakdown by IBM Technology of what AI agents are, how they reason, make decisions, use tools, and operate autonomously to accomplish complex tasks.

videos.title: Andrew Ng: AI Agentic Workflows
videos.description: Renowned AI pioneer Andrew Ng explains the paradigm shift from zero-shot prompting to agentic workflows, detailing key patterns like reflection, tool use, planning, and multi-agent collaboration.

videos.title: Introduction to LangGraph: Building Multi-Agent Architectures
videos.description: An advanced look at building stateful, multi-agent runtimes with LangGraph, showing how to coordinate multiple specialized agents in a cyclic graph structure.

videos.title: CrewAI Tutorial: Orchestrating Multi-Agent Systems
videos.description: A hands-on guide on how to program and orchestrate role-playing autonomous AI agents using the CrewAI framework to automate complex multi-step processes.

videos.title: How to Build, Deploy, and Launch a SaaS
videos.description: A comprehensive walkthrough on taking a software product from local development to production deployment and launching it to your first users.

videos.title: SaaS Pricing Models: How to Price Your Software Product
videos.description: An in-depth guide on choosing the right monetization strategy and pricing tier structure for your application to maximize conversion and revenue.

videos.title: How to Deploy a Full Stack Web App (Node, React, Postgres)
videos.description: Learn how to deploy your frontend, backend, and database using modern cloud services like Render, Vercel, and Supabase.

videos.title: Understanding Cloud Deployment & CI/CD Pipelines
videos.description: A beginner-friendly guide to continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD), explaining how to automate your software releases.
